title: cerasus × eminens
intro: Cerasus × eminens, also known as the cherry plum, is a hybrid deciduous tree or shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The medicinal properties of the cherry plum are attributed to its bark, which has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of the cherry plum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of the cherry plum are typically made from its bark, which can be dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to reap its medicinal benefits.
